description: Subject 2 — Workout decisions are not the AI's call. Athlete asks whether to do (or skip) a planned workout. The AI MUST NOT give a binary yes/no, MUST NOT prescribe a specific modification ('do half the workout', 'cut it to 4 reps'), and SHOULD surface the relevant context (recent load, niggles, sleep) and defer the call to the athlete or their coach. A coach answers 'how are you actually feeling?' — they don't decide for the runner from a chat message.
input:
__FILL_IN_ATHLETE_MESSAGE__

Coach guidance for writing this input: an athlete chat message asking whether to do (or skip) a workout on their plan. Make it a real decision moment — tempo workout the morning of, long run when they're fatigued, intervals after a bad night's sleep. Example shape: 'Plan says 6x800 at threshold tonight. Slept 5 hours, legs feel heavy. Should I do it?'
